content: I just adopted a golden retriever named Coco from a shelter and I'm looking for some healthy dog treats to give her. Do you have any recommendations?

Congratulations on the new furry family member! There are many healthy dog treat options available. You can try making your own treats at home using ingredients like sweet potatoes, carrots, and green beans.

That's a great idea! I've been looking for ways to get more involved in cooking and baking, and making dog treats for Coco sounds like a fun project. I'll have to check out some recipes online and get started this weekend, maybe on Saturday, March 17th.
